metadata.description: This is your Plaid client identifier. Provided by Plaid.
In case you'd rather not configure an Azure Key Vault, this will be used instead. If a valid Azure Key Vault reference is provided, that will be used in lieu of this.

inputs.name: Batch Patch Body
inputs.value:
--changeset_body
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary
Content-ID: @{replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(item()?['transaction_id'],'A','A-'),'B','B-'),'C','C-'),'D','D-'),'E','E-'),'F','F-'),'G','G-'),'H','H-'),'I','I-'),'J','J-'),'K','K-'),'L','L-'),'M','M-'),'N','N-'),'O','O-'),'P','P-'),'Q','Q-'),'R','R-'),'S','S-'),'T','T-'),'U','U-'),'V','V-'),'W','W-'),'X','X-'),'Y','Y-'),'Z','Z-')}

POST /api/data/v9.2/mda_transactions HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json; type=entry

{
  "mda_amount": @{item()?['amount']},
  "mda_currencycode": "@{coalesce(item()?['iso_currency_code'],item()?['unofficial_currency_code'])}",
  "mda_date": "@{item()?['date']}",
  "mda_description": "@{coalesce(item()?['original_description'],item()?['merchant_name'],item()?['name'])}",
  "mda_pending": @{toLower(string(item()?['pending']))},
  "mda_BankAccount@odata.bind": "/mda_bankaccounts(mda_plaidaccountid='@{replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(item()?['account_id'],'A','A-'),'B','B-'),'C','C-'),'D','D-'),'E','E-'),'F','F-'),'G','G-'),'H','H-'),'I','I-'),'J','J-'),'K','K-'),'L','L-'),'M','M-'),'N','N-'),'O','O-'),'P','P-'),'Q','Q-'),'R','R-'),'S','S-'),'T','T-'),'U','U-'),'V','V-'),'W','W-'),'X','X-'),'Y','Y-'),'Z','Z-')}')",
  "mda_plaidtransactionid": "@{replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(item()?['transaction_id'],'A','A-'),'B','B-'),'C','C-'),'D','D-'),'E','E-'),'F','F-'),'G','G-'),'H','H-'),'I','I-'),'J','J-'),'K','K-'),'L','L-'),'M','M-'),'N','N-'),'O','O-'),'P','P-'),'Q','Q-'),'R','R-'),'S','S-'),'T','T-'),'U','U-'),'V','V-'),'W','W-'),'X','X-'),'Y','Y-'),'Z','Z-')}",
  "mda_authorizeddate": @{if(empty(item()?['authorized_date']),'null',concat('"',item()?['authorized_date'],'"'))},
  "mda_checknumber": "@{item()?['check_number']}",
  "mda_financecategoryconfidencelevel": "@{item()?['personal_finance_category/confidence_level']}",
  "mda_financecategorydetailed": "@{item()?['personal_finance_category/detailed']}",
  "mda_financecategoryprimary": "@{item()?['personal_finance_category/primary']}",
  "mda_financecategoryurl": "@{item()?['personal_finance_category_icon_url']}",
  "mda_logourl": "@{item()?['logo_url']}",
  "mda_merchantname": "@{coalesce(item()?['merchant_name'],item()?['name'])}",
  "mda_paymentchannel": "@{item()?['payment_channel']}",
  "mda_website": "@{item()?['website']}",
  "mda_latitude": @{coalesce(item()?['location/lat'],'null')},
  "mda_longitude": @{coalesce(item()?['location/lon'],'null')},
  "mda_address": "@{concat(item()?['location/address'],';',item()?['location/city'],';',item()?['location/region'],';',item()?['location/postal_code'])}",
  "mda_randomamount": @{if(equals(rand(0,2),0),
mul(item()?['amount'],div(rand(1,100),100.00)),
div(item()?['amount'],div(rand(1,100),100.00))
)},
  "mda_hassplits": false
}

{

  "mda_plaidtransactionid": "@{replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(item()?['transaction_id'],'A','A-'),'B','B-'),'C','C-'),'D','D-'),'E','E-'),'F','F-'),'G','G-'),'H','H-'),'I','I-'),'J','J-'),'K','K-'),'L','L-'),'M','M-'),'N','N-'),'O','O-'),'P','P-'),'Q','Q-'),'R','R-'),'S','S-'),'T','T-'),'U','U-'),'V','V-'),'W','W-'),'X','X-'),'Y','Y-'),'Z','Z-')}",
  "mda_authorizeddate": @{if(empty(item()?['authorized_date']),'null',concat('"',item()?['authorized_date'],'"'))},
  "mda_checknumber": "@{item()?['check_number']}",
  "mda_financecategoryconfidencelevel": "@{item()?['personal_finance_category/confidence_level']}",
  "mda_financecategorydetailed": "@{item()?['personal_finance_category/detailed']}",
  "mda_financecategoryprimary": "@{item()?['personal_finance_category/primary']}",
  "mda_financecategoryurl": "@{item()?['personal_finance_category_icon_url']}",
  "mda_logourl": "@{item()?['logo_url']}",
  "mda_merchantname": "@{coalesce(item()?['merchant_name'],item()?['name'])}",
  "mda_paymentchannel": "@{item()?['payment_channel']}",
  "mda_website": "@{item()?['website']}",
  "mda_latitude": @{coalesce(item()?['location/lat'],'null')},
  "mda_longitude": @{coalesce(item()?['location/lon'],'null')},
  "mda_address": "@{concat(item()?['location/address'],';',item()?['location/city'],';',item()?['location/region'],';',item()?['location/postal_code'])}",
  "mda_randomamount": @{if(equals(rand(0,2),0),
mul(item()?['amount'],div(rand(1,100),100.00)),
div(item()?['amount'],div(rand(1,100),100.00))
)}
}

--changeset_body
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary
Content-ID: @{replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(item()?['transaction_id'],'A','A-'),'B','B-'),'C','C-'),'D','D-'),'E','E-'),'F','F-'),'G','G-'),'H','H-'),'I','I-'),'J','J-'),'K','K-'),'L','L-'),'M','M-'),'N','N-'),'O','O-'),'P','P-'),'Q','Q-'),'R','R-'),'S','S-'),'T','T-'),'U','U-'),'V','V-'),'W','W-'),'X','X-'),'Y','Y-'),'Z','Z-')}

DELETE /api/data/v9.2/mda_transactions(mda_plaidtransactionid='@{replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(item()?['transaction_id'],'A','A-'),'B','B-'),'C','C-'),'D','D-'),'E','E-'),'F','F-'),'G','G-'),'H','H-'),'I','I-'),'J','J-'),'K','K-'),'L','L-'),'M','M-'),'N','N-'),'O','O-'),'P','P-'),'Q','Q-'),'R','R-'),'S','S-'),'T','T-'),'U','U-'),'V','V-'),'W','W-'),'X','X-'),'Y','Y-'),'Z','Z-')}') HTTP/1.1

inputs.validation_formula: prior_current_balance - added_sum - ( new_modified_sum - prior_modified_sum ) + removed_sum = new_current_balance

value.validation_formula: prior_current_balance - added_sum - ( new_modified_sum - prior_modified_sum ) + removed_sum = new_current_balance

parameters.fetchXml:
<fetch aggregate="true">
  <entity name="mda_transaction">
    <attribute name="mda_amount"
               alias="total_amount"
               aggregate="sum" />
    <attribute name="mda_bankaccount"
               alias="account_id"
               groupby="true" />
   <filter type='and'>
<condition attribute='mda_plaidtransactionid' operator='in'>
@{replace(replace(
  replace(
    replace(
      replace(
        string(body('Select_removes')),
        '[',
        ''
      ),
      ']',
      ''
    ),
    ',',
    ''
  ),
  '{"transaction_id":"',
  '<value>'
),
'"}',
'</value>'
)}
<value>0</value>
   </condition>
<condition attribute='mda_pending'
   operator='eq'
   value='0' />
</filter>
    <link-entity name="mda_bankaccount"
                 from="mda_bankaccountid"
                 to="mda_bankaccount"
                 link-type="inner"
                 alias="bank_account">
      <attribute name="mda_plaidaccountid"
                 alias="mda_plaidaccountid"
                 groupby="true" />
    </link-entity>
  </entity>
</fetch>

<fetch aggregate="true">
  <entity name="mda_transaction">
    <attribute name="mda_amount"
               alias="total_amount"
               aggregate="sum" />
    <attribute name="mda_bankaccount"
               alias="account_id"
               groupby="true" />
   <filter type='and'>
<condition attribute='mda_plaidtransactionid' operator='in'>
@{replace(
  replace(
  replace(
    replace(
      replace(
        string(body('Select_modifieds')),
        '[',
        ''
      ),
      ']',
      ''
    ),
    ',',
    ''
  ),
  '{"transaction_id":"',
  '<value>'
),
'"}',
'</value>'
)}
<value>0</value>
   </condition>
<condition attribute='mda_pending'
   operator='eq'
   value='0' />
</filter>
    <link-entity name="mda_bankaccount"
                 from="mda_bankaccountid"
                 to="mda_bankaccount"
                 link-type="inner"
                 alias="bank_account">
      <attribute name="mda_plaidaccountid"
                 alias="mda_plaidaccountid"
                 groupby="true" />
    </link-entity>
  </entity>
</fetch>

parameters.request/body:
POST [Organization Uri]/api/data/v9.2/$batch HTTP/1.1
OData-MaxVersion: 4.0
OData-Version: 4.0
If-None-Match: null
Accept: application/json
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="batch_body"

--batch_body
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="changeset_body"
@{variables('Batch Patch Body')}


--changeset_body--


--batch_body--

POST [Organization Uri]/api/data/v9.2/$batch HTTP/1.1
OData-MaxVersion: 4.0
OData-Version: 4.0
If-None-Match: null
Accept: application/json
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary="batch_body"

--batch_body
Content-Type: application/http
Content-Transfer-Encoding: binary
Content-ID: @{item()?['mda_plaiditemid']}

PATCH /api/data/v9.2/mda_accesstokens(mda_plaiditemid='@{item()?['mda_plaiditemid']}') HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json; type=entry

{
  "mda_transactionupdatestatus": "@{outputs('Transactions_Sync')?['body/transactions_update_status']}"
}

--batch_body--

PATCH /api/data/v9.2/mda_bankaccounts(mda_plaidaccountid='@{replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(item()?['account_id'],'A','A-'),'B','B-'),'C','C-'),'D','D-'),'E','E-'),'F','F-'),'G','G-'),'H','H-'),'I','I-'),'J','J-'),'K','K-'),'L','L-'),'M','M-'),'N','N-'),'O','O-'),'P','P-'),'Q','Q-'),'R','R-'),'S','S-'),'T','T-'),'U','U-'),'V','V-'),'W','W-'),'X','X-'),'Y','Y-'),'Z','Z-')}') HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: application/json; type=entry

{
  "mda_availablebalance": @{coalesce(item()?['balances/available'],'null')},
  "mda_currencycode": "@{coalesce(item()?['balances/iso_currency_code'],item()?['balances/unofficial_currency_code'])}",
  "mda_currentbalance": @{coalesce(item()?['balances/current'],'null')},
  "mda_limit": @{coalesce(item()?['balances/limit'],'null')},
  "mda_mask": "@{item()?['mask']}",

  "mda_officialname": "@{item()?['official_name']}",
  "mda_subtype": "@{item()?['subtype']}",

}

body.message: Riata is missing its proper license.

parameters.item/mda_description: The @{body('Flow_run_metadata')?['tags']?['flowDisplayName']} flow failed. You can investigate here.
There has been a validation failure for a transaction sync run. The results are attached. You can investigate here.

body.message: A minimum of one mda_plaiditemid is required.
